name: Transportation Almanac
description: An open, versioned index of public transportation data.

entries.title: UNCTADstat
entries.description: UN Trade and Development's statistical database covering maritime transport, merchant fleets, liner shipping connectivity, and freight volumes alongside its broader trade and economy indicators.
entries.publisher: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD)
entries.notes: Verified reachable this session (HTTP 200). ITF-OECD (International Transport Forum), the other natural international transport-statistics body, returned a Cloudflare bot-challenge on direct fetch — same block class as almanac-template#2. Seeded as this vertical's first international (non-US) source per operator request to seed the new verticals international-first.
